"DuckDB query execution error (CatalogException): Catalog Error: Table with name business does not exist!
Did you mean "yelp_user.user"?

LINE 5:     FROM businessinfo_database.business

args.query:
SELECT AVG(rating) as average_rating
FROM review r
JOIN (
    SELECT business_id, description
    FROM businessinfo_database.business
    WHERE description LIKE '%Indianapolis, IN%' OR description LIKE '%Indianapolis, Indiana%'
) b ON r.business_ref = REPLACE(b.business_id, 'businessid_', 'businessref_')

exec_args.sql:
SELECT AVG(rating) as average_rating
FROM review r
JOIN (
    SELECT business_id, description
    FROM businessinfo_database.business
    WHERE description LIKE '%Indianapolis, IN%' OR description LIKE '%Indianapolis, Indiana%'
) b ON r.business_ref = REPLACE(b.business_id, 'businessid_', 'businessref_')
